channel.title: CORS Error When Passing CSV to Frontity through ACF
channel.description:
Hey! I know there are a ton of different posts on here with people getting CORS errors but none of the solutions found in them have solved this for me so far.
I have built a searchable data table using the [ant.design component](https://ant.design/components/table/) ([here](https://codeburst.io/make-a-search-engine-for-any-table-in-react-using-a-custom-hook-2367d289b910)'s a handy tutorial to follow if you're interested in building something similar) but instead of using their method to collect data for the table, I created a custom field for my clients so that they could populate the table by simply uploading a csv (using the ACF to REST API plugin). When building/running this locally I was frustrated by the CORS error but found a simple solution [here](https://community.frontity.org/t/cors-wierd-problem/1077/8) wherein @SantosGuillamot suggested using the Moesif Chrome extension to bypass this error temporarily. Unfortunately, in production the CORS error is still present and I am in need of a longer-term solution.
Here are some solutions I've attempted so far: * Modifying my .htaccess file in Site Ground with [this](https://www.siteground.com/kb/cross-origin-resource-sharing-cors/) * Modifying my functions.php file using both methods described [here](https://community.frontity.org/t/add-cors-to-rest-api/1082/7) * Modifying my fetch request as described [here](https://community.frontity.org/t/access-control-allow-origin-header-contains-multiple-values/1912/2)
[Here](https://github.com/hcbf/hcbf) is the repo for my project.
Here is a screenshot of my console and of the response headers for the .csv that seems to be causing the errors: ![Screen Shot 2021-08-03 at 2.48.14 PM|435x500](upload://xkesEMHzxAvjLJK9Ir368ECTvQw.png) ![Screen Shot 2021-08-03 at 2.49.27 PM|448x500](upload://A9NF1YxTPYJE6kOkVGExcFKJeaq.png)
Let me know if I can provide any further information.
Thanks in advance for any help you can provide!

item.title: CORS Error When Passing CSV to Frontity through ACF
item.dc:creator: kcristin
item.description:
Hey! I know there are a ton of different posts on here with people getting CORS errors but none of the solutions found in them have solved this for me so far.

I have built a searchable data table using the ant.design component (here’s a handy tutorial to follow if you’re interested in building something similar) but instead of using their method to collect data for the table, I created a custom field for my clients so that they could populate the table by simply uploading a csv (using the ACF to REST API plugin). When building/running this locally I was frustrated by the CORS error but found a simple solution here wherein @SantosGuillamot suggested using the Moesif Chrome extension to bypass this error temporarily. Unfortunately, in production the CORS error is still present and I am in need of a longer-term solution.

Here are some solutions I’ve attempted so far:

  • Modifying my .htaccess file in Site Ground with this
  • Modifying my functions.php file using both methods described here
  • Modifying my fetch request as described here

Here is the repo for my project.

Here is a screenshot of my console and of the response headers for the .csv that seems to be causing the errors:


Let me know if I can provide any further information.

Thanks in advance for any help you can provide!

Read full topic
item.source: CORS Error When Passing CSV to Frontity through ACF
